sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الطِّفْلُ مِنْ أُمِّهِ أَنْ يَرَى صُوَرَ الْأُسْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je zamolilo majku da vidi porodične fotografije.
sentences.translationEn: The child asked his mother to see the family photos.

sentences.translation: Majka je otvorila telefon i otvorila album.
sentences.translationEn: The mother opened the phone and opened the album.

sentences.translation: Gledali su fotografije zajedno i smijali se.
sentences.translationEn: They looked at the photos together and laughed.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: هَذِهِ صُورَتُكَ حِينَ كُنْتَ صَغِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Ovo je tvoja fotografija kad si bio mali.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: This is your photo when you were little.
